features.title: Bottom-up TAM/SAM/SOM engine
features.notes: TAM=30000/SAM=20000/SOM=4000 hand-verified; divergence flag at >20%; partner view strips assumptions.

features.title: Growth bridge / price-volume-mix waterfall
features.notes: Bennet symmetric decomposition; price=220/vol=91.79/mix=228.21 hand-verified; additive+reversal to 1e-6; new/lost bucket.

features.title: Payer-mix analysis and waterfall
features.notes: Shares sum 100% to 1e-9; deltas sum 0; margin-weight overlay internal-only; dilution flag; scores 0.655->0.636 hand-verified.

features.title: Percentage-of-Medicare reimbursement benchmarking
features.notes: Blended 194.29% hand-verified; basis labeled on every output; basis_mismatch flag; external anchors 196/254/171 kept with own basis.

features.title: Cohort retention / churn curves (survival-based)
features.notes: lifelines KM S(1)=.8/S(3)=.6/S(6)=.5 hand-verified; small_cohort<30 flag; cliff month=3; vintage overlay flag.

features.title: Cohort-based LTV/CAC
features.notes: Realized cumulative LTV/cust=90, payback m3, ratio 1.8 hand-verified; 3:1 ref; revenue reconciles within 2%.

features.title: Provider density / geographic heatmap
features.notes: Per-FIPS counts 5/3/2 hand-counted; density per 100k; renders FIPS+CBSA; suppression <=11 hides small cells.

features.title: Market saturation / white-space mapping
features.notes: Saturation 0.5/0.1/2.0 per 1000; white-space ranking B,A,C; >10 serve rule; FFS-only noted.

features.title: Site-of-care shift analysis
features.notes: Migration hopd_to_asc=30/ip=10/home=10 hand-verified; CY2026 OPPS/ASC note internal-only; optional ruptures overlay.

features.title: Customer concentration (top-N)
features.notes: Top-N shares + Pareto + HHI 0.325; >40% flag at 45% not at 30%; partner ranks, internal names.

features.title: Monte Carlo / scenario simulation overlay
features.notes: default_rng(seed); P50~950 theory; reproducible 1e-9; tornado ranks cms first; CMS-cut stress -100; normal/tri/beta/lognormal.

features.title: HCC/RAF risk-adjustment module (CMS-HCC V28)
features.notes: RAF=1.025 hand-verified; deterministic ICD->HCC lookup; hierarchy drops HCC38; trajectory+compression; V28 vintage labeled. Coefficient table is a labeled reference subset (drop full CMS tables to extend).

features.title: FFS-to-all-population correction
features.notes: weight=1/(1-MA); X 0.50->2000, Y 0.20->1250 hand-verified; high-MA>=40% flag; 55% national anchor; 100% MA uncomputable.

features.title: Quality / outcomes benchmarking
features.notes: Directional percentile (100=best): readmit 40/mortality 0/hcahps 100 hand-verified; bottom-quartile flag; suppression handled.

features.title: Competitive positioning map
features.notes: 2x2 bubble map; coords+bubble sizes hand-verified; quadrant classification Leaders/Challengers/Niche; median default thresholds.

features.title: Pricing waterfall + unit-economics / contribution-margin bridge
features.notes: net 80, revenue 80000, CM 35000 (43.75%), EBITDA proxy 20000 hand-verified; both waterfalls reconcile 1e-6; QoE handoff documented.

features.title: Regulatory-flag module
features.notes: Deterministic 5-rule engine; heavy-Medicaid home-health CA fires OBBBA+state-oversight; each flag has rationale+source; flags in both audiences.

features.title: Ridge + conformal forecast engine
features.notes: sklearn Ridge+StandardScaler, alpha via GridSearchCV/TimeSeriesSplit over logspace(-2,2); split-conformal 80/95; holdout coverage>=nominal-1% (82.5%/95%); reproducible 1e-9; existing ridge_predictor/conformal confirmed LLM-free.

features.title: Isolation-forest anomaly detection
features.notes: IsolationForest explicit contamination, n_estimators>=100, pinned random_state; planted 3 anomalies caught, FP 1/30; z-score reasons; reproducible.

features.title: Changepoint detection
features.notes: ruptures PELT l2/rbf, BIC-style default penalty; break at idx 10 mag+40, flat=0 cps; date mapping; feeds NEW-09 site-of-care overlay.

features.title: Two-audience UI layer
features.notes: audience.py brand envelope + find_leaks + audit_registry; sweep over all features asserts zero partner leakage, both views render core pack.

features.title: Chart-pack rendering standards
features.notes: chartpack.py validate_standards (footnote/IBCS color/em-dash) + snapshot; registry sweep 0 violations; caught+fixed NEW-16 CM end-point color.

features.title: DECISIONS.md routing pattern
features.notes: decisions.py parses DECISIONS.md, append_decision helper, missing_decisions check; 8 non-default choices all logged; demo reconciles.

features.title: Data-ingestion reconciliation
features.notes: reconcile_join (CCN/NPI/FIPS), key uniqueness, join integrity, <=11 suppression, vintage-stamp requirement; HCRIS->CareCompare integrity 2/3 hand-verified.

features.title: Profit-pool stacked column with CAGR brackets
features.notes: McKinsey signature exhibit. EBITDA stacked by segment over years, CAGR auto-brackets, ghosted projections, percent-of-NHE framing toggle. Shaped to 2024 report 583->819 (7% CAGR), HST 49->86 (12% CAGR), both hand-verified; column totals tie to segment sum; full-span CAGR rebuilds endpoint.

features.title: Marimekko profit-pool map
features.notes: McKinsey signature exhibit. EBITDA-share by EBITDA-share variant: width=sector share of industry EBITDA, height=sub-segment share of sector. Widths 10/50/5/35 match 2017/18 report; areas sum to 1.0; classic revenue-width by margin-height alternate; >7-column clutter flag. Hand-verified.

features.title: Historic versus projected growth archetype map
features.notes: Scatter of historic (x) vs projected (y) growth, bubble=EBITDA, 5% quadrant lines into sustained/accelerator/decelerator/laggard. High-growth EBITDA share (299/389) hand-verified; high-growth-pools-small flag; Pearson correlation in meta; quadrant EBITDA ties to total.

features.title: Unit-economics spine (normalized log-scale comparison)
features.notes: Capstone spine: 26 verticals (14 verified 2026 final-rule anchors, 2 sourced list-price ranges, 10 secondary-source estimates) on one log axis. Representative = geometric mean of bounds; spans about 5 orders of magnitude (hospice 181.94/day to gene therapy 4.25M). est_verify rows flagged and charted as ranges; rep-within-bounds and span identities reconcile.

features.title: 2026 payment-rate update scorecard
features.notes: Diverging bar of 12 net 2026 updates; home health -1.3% only negative; PFS dual QP +3.77/non-QP +3.26. Stated market-basket/productivity components reconcile to the net (SNF 3.3+0.6-0.7=3.2, IPF 3.2-0.7=2.5 hand-verified); negative-update and pfs-dual flags.

features.title: Payer economics comparison
features.notes: Gross margin per enrollee + MLR by segment; MA leads at 1655 (2023 1986, yoy -331 hand-verified), Medicaid MC 608. Highest-margin flag computed from data; yoy ties to 2024 minus 2023; rebate/Part B/Part D context in meta.

features.title: Commercial-to-Medicare pricing multiplier
features.notes: RAND Round 5.1 ratios (254/279/184/171%) applied to 2026 Medicare anchors: IPPS 6752.61*2.54=17151.63, OPPS 91.415*2.79=255.05 hand-verified. Product reconciles to medicare*ratio; unknown-service-type flag; AR 162 to FL 346 state spread; benchmark-not-price caveat.

features.title: Market concentration overlay
features.notes: Top-firm share by vertical: distribution 95 / PBM 80 / dialysis 77.1 (2019 JAMA) / GPO 75 clear the 70% bar (4 highly-concentrated); hospital systems ~5%. GPO and EHR flagged as industry estimates; shares validated 0-100; highly-concentrated and estimates flags.
